# kSecKeyStartDate

**Global Variable**

Type `CSSM_DATE`.  Earliest date at which this key may be used.  If the value is all zeros or not present, no restriction applies.

## Declaration

```swift
var kSecKeyStartDate: Int32 { get }
```
title: kSecKeyStartDate
